# node

**Instance Property**

The SpriteKit node managed by the component.

## Declaration

```swift
var node: SKNode { get set }
```

## Discussion

When you add this component to a [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKEntity] object, the component automatically sets the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/SpriteKit/SKNode/entity] property of its SpriteKit node to point to that entity.
title: node
